projectDescription: A production-grade, multi-phase Solana trading intelligence system that ingests real-time on-chain events, runs ML inference, and executes trades atomically on Pump.fun.
keyFeatures: Real-time Solana on-chain event ingestion with zero polling latency
ONNX LightGBM ML inference with Platt-calibrated probability scoring
7-component wallet alpha scoring across up to 5,000 wallets per 30-minute cycle
Adversarial detection: bundle clustering, bot classification, copy-trade graph analysis
Genesis Watcher: 60-second token observation with a 75-feature genesis model family
4-state market regime classification updated every 10 minutes
Phase-gated live execution with atomic transaction bundles on the Pump.fun bonding curve
Server-Sent Events live feed for real-time signal, anti-signal, and graduation events
publicApiSurface: GET /api/live/feed (SSE stream: signal, genesis_signal, anti_signal, graduation, heartbeat)
ONNX models: reach_2x_1h.onnx, reach_3x_30m.onnx, reach_2x_10m.onnx, is_dead_soon.onnx
Strategies: reach_2x_1h, reach_3x_30m, reach_2x_10m, genesis_2x_5m, genesis_3x_30m, genesis_3x_1h, genesis_5x_2h
